name: libdebhelper-perl
title: libdebhelper-perl
description:
debhelper perl modules
A collection of programs that can be used in a debian/rules file to
automate common tasks related to building Debian packages.
.
This package provides the perl modules used by the scripts in debhelper.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libdebhelper-perl because debhelper perl modules.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libdebhelper-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libdebhelper-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libdebhelper-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
